title: Checkpoints
description: Create, manage, and restore checkpoints seamlessly, ensuring your progress is always safe
body:
Checkpoints is a powerful tool for Minecraft players who want complete control over their worlds. With this mod, you can create, manage, and restore checkpoints seamlessly, ensuring your progress is always safe. Perfect for adventurers, builders, or anyone who values peace of mind while exploring Minecraft’s endless possibilities.

## Features
#### Checkpoint Management:
- Create checkpoints for your world at any time.
- Automatically organize and store checkpoints within your world directory.
#### Automatic Checkpoint Restoration:
- After a player respawns, the mod can automatically restore the latest checkpoint, making survival gameplay more forgiving.
#### User-Friendly Interface:
- Browse checkpoints through an in-game menu with previews, dates, and mod compatibility indicators.
- Restore your world with just a few clicks or commands.
#### Safe Operations:
- Prevents conflicts by locking the world during checkpoint operations to ensure data consistency.

## Why Use Checkpoints?
Whether you’re testing redstone contraptions, exploring dangerous biomes, or building massive structures, this mod lets you experiment freely, knowing you can always return to a previous state. It’s your safety net in Minecraft’s vast world of unpredictability.
